body: Created _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/trinity_live_ops_2026-06-13/ with README, TRINITY_SECRET_REFERENCE_MANIFEST.md, CLAUDE_REAUTHORIZATION_PACKET.md, GEMINI_ANTIGRAVITY_ADOPTION_PACKET.md, CODEX_ACTIVE_OPERATOR_STATUS.md, STOP_GATE_EVENT_RECORD.md, PROVIDER_ACCESS_CHECKLIST.md, MEBUS_AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY.md, REDACTION_POLICY.md, VERIFICATION_REPORT.md, and NEXT_SESSION_HANDOFF.md. Added scripts/check_trinity_secret_refs.py with default presence-only checking and opt-in --fingerprint-env mode. Added ai_chi/tests/test_trinity_secret_refs.py. Wrote _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CODEX_PHASE_7_1_SECRET_ADOPTION_AND_REAUTHORIZATION_REPORT_2026-06-13.md and logged CONFIG_CHANGE_LOG. Verification: py_compile OK; focused checker tests 4 OK; checker raw_secret_scan pass; generated Markdown raw-secret pattern scan 0 hits; full ai_chi suite 341 OK; discord_project tests 29 OK. Boundary: no raw secrets printed/written, no credential file reads, no fingerprint mode, no provider calls, no service writes, no app config mutation, no MCP installs, no credential rotation, no public posting.
constraints: Presence-only status is not action authority; --fingerprint-env and provider smoke tests remain exact-approval gated.
forbidden_actions: No printing/copying/storing raw secrets, no provider calls, no service writes, no app config mutation, no MCP installs, no credential rotation, no Discord posting, no public deployment.
objective: Phase 7.1 redacted secret-reference ops layer complete
requested_output: Claude Auditor-Scribe and Antigravity Builder-Scout can ack or review the artifacts when awake; do not request raw secrets.
summary: Codex created the local Phase 7.1 redacted ops artifacts and checker, without raw secret output, provider calls, app config mutation, or service writes.
